Description:
AK700 DIGITAL NYX
Building on the legendary AK DIGITAL lineup, the AK700 DIGITAL NYX delivers enhanced cooling and a bold new look. Equipped with seven advanced copper heat pipes, a dense single-tower heatsink, newly designed silent fan, and a high-end quad-segmented digital display, it offers top-tier performance and intuitive real-time monitoring. 

THE DIGITAL TOUCH
The standout addition of the AK700 DIGITAL NYX is the enhanced quad-segmented display that monitors the temperature, usage, wattage, and frequency of your CPU. The display is controlled via DeepCool software and only requires an open USB 2.0 header.


AI-TUNED CHILL. POWERED BY DeepCreative
With the upgraded DeepCreative interface, one click replaces BIOS tinkering — DeepCreative’s proprietary AI-driven algorithm tracks CPU load in real time to automatically match the optimal fan speed curve. This ensures perfect harmony between powerful cooling and whisper-quiet operation, all without lifting a finger.
*Fans instantly shift to full speed when CPU hits above 80 °C, crushing heat without delay
Fans automatic revert to preset mode once the CPU temp drops below 80 °C


PROVEN AK DESIGN
The AK700 DIGITAL NYX continues its legacy by featuring a precision-machined copper base and seven copper heat pipes that deliver improved heat transfer capabilities. The signature matrix fin array in a single tower heat sink layout offers better efficiency for high performance systems.


PREMIUM COMPATIBILITY
Designed with offset heat pipes to accommodate the larger heat sink depth for better component compatibility. This allows more space for tall heat spreaders and an unobstructed view of all your RAM slots.

COOL, QUIET, AND POWERFUL
Equipped with high-quality hydraulic bearings and a three-phase, six-slot, four-pole motor, the AK700 DIGITAL NYX's fans operate smoothly and quietly.
1. 0-RPM Startup/Stop effectively reduces noise and prolongs fan lifespan.
2. Activate Clearing Tech (ACT) within 8 seconds of power-on to initiate automatic dust clearing for both the fan blades and heatsink.
36 dBA
Full load noise
2700±10%PRM
Fan Speed


MULTI-PLATFORM PERFORMANCE
The durable mounting hardware provides a simple installation process that ensures proper contact and equal pressure on mainstream Intel and AMD platforms.


 Application For
Intel
LGA1851/1700/1200/115X
AMD
AM5/AM4
Technical Spec
Product Dimensions	126×98×157 mm(L×W×H)
Heatsink Dimensions	124×76×151 mm(L×W×H)
Net Weight	1252 g
Heatpipe	Ø6 mm×7 pcs
Fan Dimensions	120×120×25 mm(L×W×H)
Fan Speed	2700±10% RPM(max)
Fan Airflow	77.23 CFM
Fan Air Pressure	5.13 mmAq
Fan Noise	21.0/28.8/36.0 dB(A)
Fan Connector	4-pin PWM
Bearing Type	Hydro Bearing
Fan Rated Voltage	12 VDC
Fan Rated Current	0.35 A
Fan Power Consumption	4.2 W
Display Module Rated Current	0.13 A±10%
Display Module Rated Voltage	5 VDC
Display Module Power Consumption	0.65 W
Display Area	29x39 mm
EAN	6933412729624
P/N	R-AK700-BKNNMN-GJD-1
Label: Disipador DeepCool AK700 Digital NYX
